claimText: Cornell's AI course policy icons include a 'PP' (Privacy Protecting) icon indicating that generative AI use is permitted but no copyrighted or proprietary class materials should be uploaded unless otherwise specified.
evidenceSnippetOriginal: PP (Privacy Protecting—No Proprietary Materials): GenAI use permitted, but no uploading of copyrighted or proprietary class materials unless otherwise specified.

citation.citationTitle: AI Course Policy Icons | Center for Teaching Innovation
